rulings.Case Title: CHRIS NORRIS et al VS. NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Relief From Default And Leave To Defend
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 15, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC's Motion For Relief From Default And Leave To Defend DENIED for failure to show both lack of service and lack of actual knowledge of the proceeding.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, BY AND THROUGH ET AL VS. XIAOQI WU
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Quashing Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 15, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT XIAOQI WU and CHUAN ZHU's Motion For Order Quashing Deposition Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records OFF CALENDAR pursuant to Defendant's Notice of Withdrawal.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BANCAL MANAGEMENT CORPORATION A CALIFORNIA VS. ZORA KOLKEY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint Against Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 15, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT ZORA KOLKEY's Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint Against Plaintiff GRANTED. No opposition filed.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: U.S.BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE FOR VS. CARLOTA DEL PORTILLO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Stay Penidng Appeal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 15, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT CARLOTA DEL PORTILLO and ELENA ASTURIAS Motion For Stay Pending Appeal GRANTED pending the posting of bond equal to the fair market rental value of the property, property taxes, and insurance costs through December 2018.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN HOM VS. PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 15, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Defendant fails to shift burden: Defendant fails to provide evidence establishing that section 1962 applies to the premises; that the amount Plaintiff demanded in the 10-day notice was "unreasonably" overestimated; that notice is defective; or that Plaintiff failed to show that he is the landlord. No opposition filed.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JESSICA JOHANNA SAINEZ VS. RENEE A. OLIVAS-CARRASCO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 15, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANT RENEE OLIVAS-CARRASCO'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR - first amended complaint filed within statutorily allowed period.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DANIEL WONG VS. ALEXINA NAVARRO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 15, 2017 line 7. DEFENDANT ALEXINA NAVARRO's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons Hearing required. Process server and moving party to be present.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DANIEL WONG VS. ALEXINA NAVARRO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration In Support
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 15, 2017 line 7. DEFENDANT ANDREW NAVARRO's Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons Hearing required. Process server and moving party to be present. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL J. TURON VS. JENNIFER RODRIGUE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 15, 2017 line 8. DEFENDANT JENNIFER RODRIGUE's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Hearing required.= (501/REQ)
